content:
We'll swap the checkpoint to SDXL, adjust the latent size to 1024×1024, and replace the CLIP encoders with the SDXL-specific dual‑CLIP encode node.
```batch
del positive
del negative
checkpointloadersimple.ckpt_name = 'sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors'
emptylatentimage.width = 1024
emptylatentimage.height = 1024
positive = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.CLIP, text='masterpiece, best quality')
negative = CLIPTextEncodeSDXL(clip=checkpointloadersimple.CLIP, text='lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality')
done()
```
